summary: Commercial Booking Experience Layer (Iteration 82) - Frontend & Backend testing complete. All 32 backend API tests PASS (100%). Frontend UI verified: Unified Search Page with product type tabs, search form, results display. Reconciliation Dashboard with metrics cards, mismatches table, audit trail, and severity filter all functional.

issues: 'Coklu Supplier Arama' navigation item may not be visible in collapsed sidebar state - direct URL navigation works

critical_code_review_comments: Unified Search Page loads correctly at /app/agency/unified-search with all UI elements
Product type tabs (hotel, tour, flight, transfer, activity) are clickable and switch correctly
Search form fields (destination, check-in, check-out, adults, children) work properly
Search submit triggers API call and shows 'No results' message (expected with test credentials)
Reconciliation Dashboard loads at /app/admin/reconciliation with 6 metrics cards
Metrics cards show correct data: Toplam Rezervasyon, Basarili, Basarisiz, Fallback Tetiklenmesi, Fiyat Sapma, Iptal Edilen
Uyumsuzluklar and Audit Trail tabs work correctly with proper empty states
Reconciliation summary cards show Toplam Kontrol, Uyumlu, Uyumsuz, Bekleyen
Severity filter dropdown works on mismatches table
All backend APIs respond with correct structure and data

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI components render and interact correctly)

test_credentials: Agency Admin: agency1@demo.test / agency123, Super Admin: agent@acenta.test / agent123
seed_data_creation: Search, revalidation, and booking tests created audit entries in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commercial Booking Experience Layer (iteration 82) fully tested. Key frontend routes: /app/agency/unified-search (Unified Search Page with booking flow), /app/admin/reconciliation (Reconciliation Dashboard with metrics and audit). All backend APIs verified: POST /api/unified-booking/search, POST /api/unified-booking/revalidate, POST /api/unified-booking/book, GET /api/unified-booking/metrics, GET /api/unified-booking/audit, GET /api/unified-booking/reconciliation-mismatches. Supplier API calls fail with test credentials (expected) - UI flow verification focus.

unified_search_page.product_type_tabs: PASS - Hotel, Tour, Flight, Transfer, Activity tabs all clickable
unified_search_page.search_form: PASS - Destination, check-in, check-out, adults, children fields work
unified_search_page.results_display: PASS - Shows 'Sonuc bulunamadi' message (expected with test creds)

reconciliation_dashboard.metrics_cards: PASS - 6 metric cards visible with correct labels
reconciliation_dashboard.tabs: PASS - Uyumsuzluklar and Audit Trail tabs work
reconciliation_dashboard.summary_cards: PASS - Toplam Kontrol, Uyumlu, Uyumsuz, Bekleyen displayed
reconciliation_dashboard.audit_trail_table: PASS - Shows audit events with event_type, supplier, booking_id, details, timestamp

backend_apis.POST_search: PASS - Fans to correct suppliers by product type
backend_apis.GET_reconciliation_mismatches: PASS - Returns mismatches list and summary

mocked_note: No mocked APIs. Real supplier endpoints are called but fail with test credentials (expected behavior). Testing focused on UI components and API response structure.
